headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Mosaic, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeffrey Zekaukas   maintains Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $24 to $19.

headline: Chips Push the S&P 500 to 7,400, Supercycle or the Last Act of a Bubble?

headline: Mosaic Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) executives said the company is cutting costs, curtailing some phosphate production and reducing capital spending as geopolitical disruptions drive raw material shortages and pressure fertilizer industry margins. headline: S&P 500 Settles Above 7,400: Investor Sentiment Improves Slightly, Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
